title: A school science fair
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Last Friday, our school held a science fair in the main hall. Students from different classes prepared projects and explained them to visitors. My group made a model bridge using wood and string because we wanted to learn more (27) engineering. We tested how much weight the bridge could hold before it broke. Some projects were more complicated (28) ours, but our teacher said our explanation was clear. A group near us showed how electricity can pass (29) different materials. I was impressed by their experiment because it looked simple but taught everyone a lot. Parents walked around the hall, asking questions and taking photos. At the end, the head teacher thanked all the students (30) their hard work. Although our project did not win a prize, I was satisfied (31) what we had made. I would like to take part again (32) year.
